rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 19, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANT STERLING SAVINGS BANK's Application For Osc Re: Contempt. Off Calendar per moving party. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KAREN SAYLOR VS. RUSSELL LAU et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Demurrer By Defendant Russell Lau
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 19, 2012, line 6. Defendant Russell Lau's Demurrer. Sustain without leave to amend as to the fourth and ninth causes of action which are penalty in nature and sujbect to CCP 340 one year statute of limitations. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOWONNA BUTLER et al VS. EDGAR GARCIA et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 19, 2012, line 7. DEFENDANTs JAMES KOH, MARIA MORALES and JAMES CORDOVA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule, ten days to answer. Prior case dismissed Jan. 27, 2012. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HERLINDA HERNANDEZ VS. ONEWEST BANK, FSB

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. MANUELA ALVAREZ et al

rulings.Case Title: GENEVA TERRACE PROPERTY OWNERS ASSOCIATION, INC. VS. JIMMIE R JOHNSON et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 19, 2012, line 5. PLAINTIFF GENEVA TERRACE PROPERTY OWNERS ASSOCIATION, INC.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.
